ofmLink.description: URL to the product page on the Open:FactSet Marketplace

ofmProductId.description: The id defining a product in the Open:FactSet Marketplace

entitled.description: Flag indicating if the user is entitled to access the data in their subscriptions

providerName.description: Name of the Data Provider for the product

dataFeed.description: Flag indicating if this product is available in a data feed

api.description: Flag indicating if this product is available in an api

referenceDataFeed.description: Flag indicating if this product is maintained by RDF/UCF
